creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=649e05b0186c21fdedd225f4b2c318bd605b8e3d

commit 649e05b0186c21fdedd225f4b2c318bd605b8e3d
Author:     Dries Michiels <driesm.michiels@gmail.com>
AuthorDate: 2021-06-14 15:59:04 +0000
Commit:     Kevin Bowling <kbowling@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2021-06-14 16:02:43 +0000

    multimedia/emby-server: Cleanups

    Update pkg-message and remove update package

    The comment has become stale once LAME has been enabled by default.
    Furthermore remove the "updatepackage" argument to the start script.
    We follow-up packages through pkg, not external sources. Users wanting
    to get notified about new releases should track github.

    PR:             256600
    Approved by:    maintainer

 multimedia/emby-server/Makefile             | 1 +
 multimedia/emby-server/files/emby-server.in | 3 +--
 multimedia/emby-server/pkg-message          | 3 ---
 3 files changed, 2 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)
